name: Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc.
summary: Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc. is a Maryland-chartered bank holding company headquartered in Oswego, New York, operating through its wholly owned subsidiary Pathfinder Bank, a New York-chartered commercial bank. The Bank offers deposit accounts, commercial and residential real estate loans, commercial business loans, consumer loans, and investment securities. It operates thirteen branch offices across Oswego, Onondaga, and Oneida Counties, NY, serving individuals, families, small to mid-size businesses, and municipalities.
